vibe: Authority, Clarity, Truth. Functional precision through strict grids, stark monochrome foundations, and hyper-targeted color usage. It avoids the generic 'SaaS blue' and completely drops soft, uninspired layouts.

rules: H1: text-5xl to text-6xl, tracking-tighter, font-black. Left-aligned.
H2: text-3xl to text-4xl, tracking-tight, font-bold.
Body: text-base, leading-relaxed, IBM Plex Sans.
Never center-align headings by default; strict left-alignment preferred for Swiss aesthetic.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Use p-8 or p-12 for containers. Borders must have internal padding. Eliminate 'cramped' default component paddings.
spacing_and_layout.landing_page_grid: Mode A: The Tetris Grid. Asymmetry, gap-8 to gap-12. Overlapping elements. Do not just use a standard 2-column flexbox.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: Mode B: The Control Room Grid. Dense, gap-4 to gap-6. Every pixel utilized. F-pattern optimized.
spacing_and_layout.borders: Expose the skeleton. Use border-collapse styles or border-r/border-b on grid items for a technical look.

surface_strategies.landing_hero: Solid white background with subtle geometric grid lines (border-black/5). No heavy gradients.
surface_strategies.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: bg-white/70, backdrop-blur-2xl, border-b border-black/10, saturate-150.
surface_strategies.dashboard_cards: Flat solid background, 1px hard border (border-black/10), NO shadow by default. Hover: shadow-lg, -translate-y-1.
surface_strategies.buttons: Square or very slightly rounded (rounded-sm). High contrast. Primary buttons are #002FA7 with white text.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Buttons must have explicit text color on hover. E.g., hover:bg-[#00207A] hover:text-white.
motion_and_interactions.focus_states: High contrast focus rings: focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#002FA7] focus:ring-offset-2.
motion_and_interactions.micro_interactions: Typing indicators pulse, new message slides in smoothly (Framer Motion).

components.icons: @phosphor-icons/react - Duotone for marketing, Regular/Fill for dashboard.
components.charts: Recharts via shadcn chart components. Minimalist, mostly monochrome with primary color accents.
components.forms: Strictly Shadcn Input, Select, Form. Customize to have 1px solid border, zero border-radius (or rounded-sm).

hero_image.description: Team collaborating with sticky notes on glass wall. Overlay: bg-white/20 with text shadow for contrast.

team_collaboration.description: Diverse team brainstorming in contemporary office.

abstract_secure_bg.description: Abstract security/data locks representation for background textures.

media.usage_rules: Use images inside geometric containers (rectangles or squares). No excessive rounded corners. Always ensure accessible contrast if text overlays images.

testing.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-form-submit-button'). Convention: kebab-case, role-based.

instructions_to_main_agent: Load and apply Cabinet Grotesk (headings) and IBM Plex Sans (body). Do not use Inter or generic sans.
Enforce the exact International Klein Blue (#002FA7) provided for primary actions.
For the Landing page, utilize raw HTML/Tailwind for bento-box asymmetrical grids. Do not default to boilerplate Shadcn Cards for the marketing layout.
For Dashboard/Chat/Admin workspaces, integrate Shadcn/ui deeply but override the border-radius (rounded-sm or none) to align with the sharp Swiss aesthetic.
Apply explicit focus and hover states with sufficient contrast on all interactable elements.
Implement pure F-pattern for the chat dashboard: Collapsible left sidebar, North Star metric top left, and embedded action-oriented messaging widgets.
Inject 'data-testid' to every interactive element (buttons, forms, navigation) to pass testability mandates.
Execute full production build, deployment, and live link generation as explicitly requested by the user's instructions.
